channel.title: FMallSectionsDR
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from FMallSectionsDR, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Trump Administration Reverses Obama-Era School Discipline Guidelines Based on Race
item.description: The Department of Education announced it is ending regulations that were used to enforce different disciplinary standards based on race.

item.title: Obama Center subcontractor halts operations amid $4 million payment dispute
item.description: A plumbing subcontractor claiming nearly $4 million in unpaid work on the Obama Presidential Center has suspended operations and laid off 25 union workers.

item.title: Large-scale desalination could help offset Colorado River water shortage
item.description: The federal government has options for addressing political resistance in California.

item.title: Congress scrutinizes American Bar Association's engagement with DEI policies
item.description: The ABA 'has continuously pursued discriminatory DEI practices,' said Rep. Brandon Gill, R-Texas.
